## Summary

Provide a short summary of your changes.

## Related Issue

Link the issue this PR addresses.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore

## Testing

Describe tests you ran (if any):

- [ ] npm run lint (client)
- [ ] Manual smoke test

## Screenshots / Screen Recording (UI changes)

Attach visuals if the UI was affected.

## Accessibility Checklist (UI changes)

- [ ] Icon-only controls include aria-label
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works (Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter, Space)
- [ ] Contrast meets 4.5:1 for glassmorphic elements
- [ ] EcoCoin badges and leaderboard are screen reader friendly

## Final Checklist

- [ ] PR is linked to an issue
- [ ] No console.log left in code
- [ ] Mobile layout verified
- [ ] Relevant documentation updated
